reviews.review_title: An amazing new way to listen to music!
reviews.review_description: Usually listening to music is such a passive experience, but with this app you are fully immersed in the song. Sounds float all around you and the effect of music and visuals are always evolving and changing with the music. A wonderful … and FREE … app!

I've had consumer VR since 2016 and have tried countless free programs; this experience really stands out and deserves your time.  Basically, this is an album presented with a fully-realized and engaging VR environment.  The music is actually really nice and appropriate for the visuals.  The interactivity is extremely well thought out and engaging.  I could hype it further, but needless to say it's something you'll need to check out yourself to see how you enjoy it.  I think the creators did a fantastic job--creating an app like this not only helps promote their music, but adds true engagement.  It's also really well executed in VR and is fun, relaxing, and memorable.  I probably sound like a shill, but I enjoy it quite a bit and am impressed at how innovative it is.  It's a free app and I highly recommend checking it out.

developer_response.body: Wow - these comments are really amazing and so glad to hear that you enjoyed the experience overall!  This was a passion-project of mine for several years and glad to hear that all the hard work (and money!) paid off to create it for you.

reviews.review_description: Quite a nice application to allow musicians to promote their music along with the programmers. Fun! Love the interaction.

developer_response.body: Thanks for trying it out and for leaving the positive feedback ~ much appreciated!

reviews.review_description: Once you learn the controls, this is a cool way to interact with music. I love the minimalist art style, and how the experience is customized for different songs.

developer_response.body: Huge thanks for trying out the app and that you had an enjoyable music experience!

reviews.review_description: an elegant, efficient, real and immersive experience: a pure moment of pleasure

developer_response.body: So glad to hear you had such a wonderful experience in the (m)ORPH Music-VR app! I really appreciate you trying it out and especially for leaving such a glowing review.

reviews.review_title: This After COSMIC SUGAR let me down
reviews.review_description: The little thumbnail picture for this app looked promising. It turns out, that it was not that intuitive, which made it difficult to get immersed and it didn’t really make me want to explore it more. COSMIC SUGAR on the other hand was great. I think I was looking for more of that experience.

developer_response.body: Thanks for checking out my VR-music app. Sorry to hear you didn't have a better time with it and that the controls were not obvious.  I included a whole screen on the main menu dedicated to what you can do with the buttons/joysticks, but sounds like it didn't help that much?  Anyway, appreciate you trying it out!
